# list.txt — af list over the v1 sessions directory.
#
# Scenario 1: no sessions dir at all → "no workstreams".
# Scenario 2: two fixture sessions → one row per workstream, sorted by
#             name, formatted "<name> <status> <branch>".
# Scenario 3 (failure): list takes no positional args.

env HOME=$WORK/home

# ── Scenario 1: empty state dir prints the placeholder ────────────────────────
exec af list
stdout 'no workstreams'

# ── Scenario 2: two fixture sessions are both listed ──────────────────────────
# Stage the state.toml fixtures under the canonical sessions dir.
mkdir $HOME/.local/share/af/v1/sessions/alpha
mkdir $HOME/.local/share/af/v1/sessions/beta
cp fixtures/alpha.toml $HOME/.local/share/af/v1/sessions/alpha/state.toml
cp fixtures/beta.toml $HOME/.local/share/af/v1/sessions/beta/state.toml

exec af list
stdout 'alpha\s+active\s+kakkoyun/alpha'
stdout 'beta\s+suspended\s+kakkoyun/beta'
! stdout 'no workstreams'

# ── Scenario 3 (failure): positional args are rejected ────────────────────────
! exec af list extra
stderr 'unknown command "extra" for "af list"'

-- fixtures/alpha.toml --
schema_version = 1

[session]
id = "00000000-0000-0000-0000-00000000000a"
name = "alpha"
status = "active"
created_at = 2026-05-21T12:00:00Z

[worktree]
path = "/tmp/wt/alpha"
branch = "kakkoyun/alpha"
base_branch = "main"
repo_slug = "github.com/owner/repo"

-- fixtures/beta.toml --
schema_version = 1

[session]
id = "00000000-0000-0000-0000-00000000000b"
name = "beta"
status = "suspended"
created_at = 2026-05-22T09:30:00Z

[worktree]
path = "/tmp/wt/beta"
branch = "kakkoyun/beta"
base_branch = "main"
repo_slug = "github.com/owner/repo"
